originalTitle: Scary Movie | Final Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
content: you really thought, huh? SIKE!🤣 watch the final trailer for #ScaryMovie now and catch it IN THEATRES THIS FRIDAY! get tickets: https://paramnt.us/scarymovietix Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture. Connect with #ScaryMovie Online: Website: https://www.scarymovie.film Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/ X: https://x.com/ScaryMovie Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ScaryMovie TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@scarymovie Threads: https://www.threads.com/@scarymovie Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group. chineseSummary: 派拉蒙影业 · 620,342 次观看
chineseContent: 你真的以为是吗？ SIKE！🤣 立即观看 #ScaryMovie 的最终预告片，并于本周五在影院观看！获取门票：https://paramnt.us/scarymovietix 逃脱一位熟悉的蒙面杀手（“鬼脸”）二十六年后，核心四人组再次成为杀手的瞄准目标，没有任何恐怖电影 IP 是安全的。马龙·韦恩斯（《矮子》）、肖恩·韦恩斯（《雷》）、安娜·法瑞丝（《辛迪》）和雷吉娜·霍尔（《布伦达》）在《恐怖电影》中重聚，同时回归的最爱和新鲜面孔也将通过重启、翻拍、续集、前传、续集、衍生剧、高度恐怖、起源故事、任何带有“遗产”一词的内容，以及每一个绝对不是最终版本的“最终章”。没有什么是神圣的。没有任何比喻能够幸存。​每一条线都会被跨越。韦恩夫妇回来取消取消文化。与#ScaryMovie Online 联系： 网站：https://www.scarymovie.film Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/ X：https://x.com/ScaryMovie Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/ScaryMovie TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@scarymovie 话题：https://www.threads.com/@scarymovie 派拉蒙影业公司 (PPC)，一家全球制片人和发行商电影娱乐是派拉蒙旗下 Skydance Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：PSKY）的子公司，派拉蒙是一家领先的下一代全球媒体和娱乐公司，由三个业务部门组成：电影娱乐、直接面向消费者和电视媒体。派拉蒙影业拥有电影娱乐领域一些最强大的品牌，包括派拉蒙影业和派拉蒙动画。 PPC 业务还包括派拉蒙家庭娱乐公司、派拉蒙影业国际公司、派拉蒙授权公司和派拉蒙工作室集团。在线联系派拉蒙影业： 官方网站：http://www.paramount.com/ TikTok：https://www.tiktok.co
